response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of recent, hands-on C++ development, STL usage, multi-threading, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Extensive background in event-driven systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, MQTT, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded or real-time systems
